positive: A minimalist line art illustration of a whimsical forest scene. The central element is a stylized grouping of mushrooms, ferns, and glowing bioluminescent fauna that create a strong silhouette against a twilight sky. Use a clean, continuous line style (single weight), emphasizing negative space and strong contrast. Color palette should be muted jewel tones (deep teal, emerald, amethyst) accented by electric pops of neon cyan and yellow only for the bioluminescence. Composition must be centered, designed to wrap around a cylindrical object like a shirt. Ideal for screen printing or DTG printing on apparel. Aspect ratio must be square and high detail.
negative: photorealistic, render, blur, messy lines, text, signature, watermark, low detail, noise, artifact, bad anatomy, duplicate, cartoonish exaggeration, messy composition, graffiti
